TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Belguim hya' ga cyux maki' tay 50 50 N, 4 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 30,528 sq km (maki' tay 141ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 30,278 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,409,077. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 44.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 22.40%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 33.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Brussels. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. as. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ő≤el…£uim ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤rus~…ēs~…ēels~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. as~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Belguim hya' ga cyux maki' tay 50 50 N, 4 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 30,528 sq km (maki' tay 141ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 30,278 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,409,077. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 44.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 22.40%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 33.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Brussels. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. as. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ő≤el…£uim ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤rus~…ēs~…ēels~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. as~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
